name._value: [Deep Forest of Patience] John's Pink Flower Basket

1._value: I met a fisherman named #p100# in #m10000000#. He wanted to get his wife a nice flower basket for their upcoming anniversary. He asked me if I could get him #b10 #t4031042#s#k for her. According to him, a #p609# can lead me to where the flower is. #m10005000#... #m10005000#??? That's FAR!!!

2._value: I got #p100# all #b10 #t4031042#s#k. With these, he can make a beautiful flower basket for his wife on their anniversary. As a sign of appreciation, #p100# got me a whole bunch of screws left over from parts of a ship. By the way, if there are this many screws that have fallen out of that ship, then how in the world is it even working...? Is it still carrying passengers???

0._value: How's traveling these days? I actually have a favor to ask you... this time, my wedding anniversary is coming up and I need flowers. Can you get them for me?

Thank you! This time I'd like to give my wife #b#t4031042#s#k... They have a very pleasant scent, and I heard they're found deep in the forest... I heard the place where they exist doesn't let everyone in; only a select few, I think. Something about a #p609# in #m10005000# and something something...

1._value: Please get me #b10 #t4031042#s#k. I think 10 will cover the house with that pleasant scent. Please hurry!

0._value: I understand... my wedding anniversary is coming up and I am screwed! Please come back if you have some spare time.

Ohhh... you got me #b10 #b#t4031042#s#k~! This is awesome... I can't believe you went deep into the forest and got these flowers... there's a story about this flower where it supposedly doesn't die for 100 years. With this, I can make my wife happy.

1._value: Oh, and... since you have worked hard for me, I should reward you well. I found some #t4003000#s in the ship. They seem to have been parts from a nearby ship. They look like something you might need, so take them.

0._value: If you have time, why not try going back into the forest? You might find an important item in there. I can't guarantee it since obviously I've never been there before, so please don't come back complaining if all you can find is trash.

You haven't gotten the #b#t4031042#s#k yet. There's a #p609# in #m10005000# and I heard that with that you can go to the place where the #t4031042#s#k are. Please go into the forest and collect the #t4031042#s#k for me. I need 10 for my wedding anniversary.
